data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies user choices to reduce decision-making time.
data.technical_spec: Optimized on-screen options for quick navigation.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design of interactive elements for easy access.
data.technical_spec: Larger buttons and actionable elements for TV remote use.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Emphasizing aesthetics to improve perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Visually appealing interfaces with modern design principles.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items visually to enhance comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Category-based content grouping for intuitive browsing.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Leveraging familiar design patterns to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of navigation patterns familiar to users of similar platforms.
